text:
There is updated version of lang/rakudo (  attached shar  file of port).

http://downloads.sourceforge.net/rakudoport/rakudo-200909.tgz

Changes:
      + update rakudo :#21("Seattle")
      + build from installed parrot (ver 1.6.0)

This is port depend on parrot 1.6.0
(http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=138127)


Best regards
